name: accessor-pairs
description: Enforce getter and setter pairs in objects and classes

name: array-bracket-newline
description: Enforce linebreaks after opening and before closing array brackets

name: array-bracket-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing inside array brackets

name: array-callback-return
description: Enforce `return` statements in callbacks of array methods

name: array-element-newline
description: Enforce line breaks after each array element

name: arrow-body-style
description: Require braces around arrow function bodies

name: arrow-parens
description: Require parentheses around arrow function arguments

name: arrow-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing before and after the arrow in arrow functions

name: block-scoped-var
description: Enforce the use of variables within the scope they are defined

name: block-spacing
description: Disallow or enforce spaces inside of blocks after opening block and before closing block

name: brace-style
description: Enforce consistent brace style for blocks

name: callback-return
description: Require `return` statements after callbacks

name: camelcase
description: Enforce camelcase naming convention

name: capitalized-comments
description: Enforce or disallow capitalization of the first letter of a comment

name: class-methods-use-this
description: Enforce that class methods utilize `this`

name: comma-dangle
description: Require or disallow trailing commas

name: comma-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing before and after commas

name: comma-style
description: Enforce consistent comma style

name: complexity
description: Enforce a maximum cyclomatic complexity allowed in a program

name: computed-property-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing inside computed property brackets

name: consistent-return
description: Require `return` statements to either always or never specify values

name: consistent-this
description: Enforce consistent naming when capturing the current execution context

name: constructor-super
description: Require `super()` calls in constructors

name: curly
description: Enforce consistent brace style for all control statements

name: default-case
description: Require `default` cases in `switch` statements

name: default-case-last
description: Enforce `default` clauses in `switch` statements to be last

name: default-param-last
description: Enforce default parameters to be last

name: dot-location
description: Enforce consistent newlines before and after dots

name: dot-notation
description: Enforce dot notation whenever possible

name: eol-last
description: Require or disallow newline at the end of files

name: eqeqeq
description: Require the use of `===` and `!==`

name: for-direction
description: Enforce `for` loop update clause moving the counter in the right direction

name: func-call-spacing
description: Require or disallow spacing between function identifiers and their invocations

name: func-name-matching
description: Require function names to match the name of the variable or property to which they are assigned

name: func-names
description: Require or disallow named `function` expressions

name: func-style
description: Enforce the consistent use of either `function` declarations or expressions assigned to variables

name: function-call-argument-newline
description: Enforce line breaks between arguments of a function call

name: function-paren-newline
description: Enforce consistent line breaks inside function parentheses

name: generator-star-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing around `*` operators in generator functions

name: getter-return
description: Enforce `return` statements in getters

name: global-require
description: Require `require()` calls to be placed at top-level module scope

name: grouped-accessor-pairs
description: Require grouped accessor pairs in object literals and classes

name: guard-for-in
description: Require `for-in` loops to include an `if` statement

name: handle-callback-err
description: Require error handling in callbacks

name: id-blacklist
description: Disallow specified identifiers

name: id-denylist
description: Disallow specified identifiers

name: id-length
description: Enforce minimum and maximum identifier lengths

name: id-match
description: Require identifiers to match a specified regular expression

name: implicit-arrow-linebreak
description: Enforce the location of arrow function bodies

name: indent
description: Enforce consistent indentation

name: indent-legacy
description: Enforce consistent indentation

name: init-declarations
description: Require or disallow initialization in variable declarations

name: jsx-quotes
description: Enforce the consistent use of either double or single quotes in JSX attributes

name: key-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing between keys and values in object literal properties

name: keyword-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing before and after keywords

name: line-comment-position
description: Enforce position of line comments

name: linebreak-style
description: Enforce consistent linebreak style

name: lines-around-comment
description: Require empty lines around comments

name: lines-around-directive
description: Require or disallow newlines around directives

name: lines-between-class-members
description: Require or disallow an empty line between class members

name: logical-assignment-operators
description: Require or disallow logical assignment operator shorthand

name: max-classes-per-file
description: Enforce a maximum number of classes per file

name: max-depth
description: Enforce a maximum depth that blocks can be nested

name: max-len
description: Enforce a maximum line length

name: max-lines
description: Enforce a maximum number of lines per file

name: max-lines-per-function
description: Enforce a maximum number of lines of code in a function

name: max-nested-callbacks
description: Enforce a maximum depth that callbacks can be nested

name: max-params
description: Enforce a maximum number of parameters in function definitions

countVoidThis.description: Whether to count a `this` declaration when the type is `void`.

name: max-statements
description: Enforce a maximum number of statements allowed in function blocks

name: max-statements-per-line
description: Enforce a maximum number of statements allowed per line

name: multiline-comment-style
description: Enforce a particular style for multiline comments

name: multiline-ternary
description: Enforce newlines between operands of ternary expressions

name: new-cap
description: Require constructor names to begin with a capital letter

name: new-parens
description: Enforce or disallow parentheses when invoking a constructor with no arguments

name: newline-after-var
description: Require or disallow an empty line after variable declarations

name: newline-before-return
description: Require an empty line before `return` statements

name: newline-per-chained-call
description: Require a newline after each call in a method chain

name: no-alert
description: Disallow the use of `alert`, `confirm`, and `prompt`

name: no-array-constructor
description: Disallow `Array` constructors

name: no-async-promise-executor
description: Disallow using an async function as a Promise executor

name: no-await-in-loop
description: Disallow `await` inside of loops

name: no-bitwise
description: Disallow bitwise operators

name: no-buffer-constructor
description: Disallow use of the `Buffer()` constructor

name: no-caller
description: Disallow the use of `arguments.caller` or `arguments.callee`

name: no-case-declarations
description: Disallow lexical declarations in case clauses

name: no-catch-shadow
description: Disallow `catch` clause parameters from shadowing variables in the outer scope

name: no-class-assign
description: Disallow reassigning class members

name: no-compare-neg-zero
description: Disallow comparing against `-0`

name: no-cond-assign
description: Disallow assignment operators in conditional expressions

name: no-confusing-arrow
description: Disallow arrow functions where they could be confused with comparisons

name: no-console
description: Disallow the use of `console`

name: no-const-assign
description: Disallow reassigning `const`, `using`, and `await using` variables

name: no-constant-binary-expression
description: Disallow expressions where the operation doesn't affect the value

name: no-constant-condition
description: Disallow constant expressions in conditions

name: no-constructor-return
description: Disallow returning value from constructor

name: no-continue
description: Disallow `continue` statements

name: no-control-regex
description: Disallow control characters in regular expressions

name: no-debugger
description: Disallow the use of `debugger`

name: no-delete-var
description: Disallow deleting variables

name: no-div-regex
description: Disallow equal signs explicitly at the beginning of regular expressions

name: no-dupe-args
description: Disallow duplicate arguments in `function` definitions

name: no-dupe-class-members
description: Disallow duplicate class members

name: no-dupe-else-if
description: Disallow duplicate conditions in if-else-if chains

name: no-dupe-keys
description: Disallow duplicate keys in object literals

name: no-duplicate-case
description: Disallow duplicate case labels

name: no-duplicate-imports
description: Disallow duplicate module imports

name: no-else-return
description: Disallow `else` blocks after `return` statements in `if` statements

name: no-empty
description: Disallow empty block statements

name: no-empty-character-class
description: Disallow empty character classes in regular expressions

name: no-empty-function
description: Disallow empty functions

name: no-empty-pattern
description: Disallow empty destructuring patterns

name: no-empty-static-block
description: Disallow empty static blocks

name: no-eq-null
description: Disallow `null` comparisons without type-checking operators

name: no-eval
description: Disallow the use of `eval()`

name: no-ex-assign
description: Disallow reassigning exceptions in `catch` clauses

name: no-extend-native
description: Disallow extending native types

name: no-extra-bind
description: Disallow unnecessary calls to `.bind()`

name: no-extra-boolean-cast
description: Disallow unnecessary boolean casts

name: no-extra-label
description: Disallow unnecessary labels

name: no-extra-parens
description: Disallow unnecessary parentheses

name: no-extra-semi
description: Disallow unnecessary semicolons

name: no-fallthrough
description: Disallow fallthrough of `case` statements

name: no-floating-decimal
description: Disallow leading or trailing decimal points in numeric literals

name: no-func-assign
description: Disallow reassigning `function` declarations

name: no-global-assign
description: Disallow assignments to native objects or read-only global variables

name: no-implicit-coercion
description: Disallow shorthand type conversions

name: no-implicit-globals
description: Disallow declarations in the global scope

name: no-implied-eval
description: Disallow the use of `eval()`-like methods

name: no-import-assign
description: Disallow assigning to imported bindings

name: no-inline-comments
description: Disallow inline comments after code

name: no-inner-declarations
description: Disallow variable or `function` declarations in nested blocks

name: no-invalid-regexp
description: Disallow invalid regular expression strings in `RegExp` constructors

name: no-invalid-this
description: Disallow use of `this` in contexts where the value of `this` is `undefined`

name: no-irregular-whitespace
description: Disallow irregular whitespace

name: no-iterator
description: Disallow the use of the `__iterator__` property

name: no-label-var
description: Disallow labels that share a name with a variable

name: no-labels
description: Disallow labeled statements

name: no-lone-blocks
description: Disallow unnecessary nested blocks

name: no-lonely-if
description: Disallow `if` statements as the only statement in `else` blocks

name: no-loop-func
description: Disallow function declarations that contain unsafe references inside loop statements

name: no-loss-of-precision
description: Disallow literal numbers that lose precision

name: no-magic-numbers
description: Disallow magic numbers

name: no-misleading-character-class
description: Disallow characters which are made with multiple code points in character class syntax

name: no-mixed-operators
description: Disallow mixed binary operators

name: no-mixed-requires
description: Disallow `require` calls to be mixed with regular variable declarations

name: no-mixed-spaces-and-tabs
description: Disallow mixed spaces and tabs for indentation

name: no-multi-assign
description: Disallow use of chained assignment expressions

name: no-multi-spaces
description: Disallow multiple spaces

name: no-multi-str
description: Disallow multiline strings

name: no-multiple-empty-lines
description: Disallow multiple empty lines

name: no-native-reassign
description: Disallow assignments to native objects or read-only global variables

name: no-negated-condition
description: Disallow negated conditions

name: no-negated-in-lhs
description: Disallow negating the left operand in `in` expressions

name: no-nested-ternary
description: Disallow nested ternary expressions

name: no-new
description: Disallow `new` operators outside of assignments or comparisons

name: no-new-func
description: Disallow `new` operators with the `Function` object

name: no-new-native-nonconstructor
description: Disallow `new` operators with global non-constructor functions

name: no-new-object
description: Disallow `Object` constructors

name: no-new-require
description: Disallow `new` operators with calls to `require`

name: no-new-symbol
description: Disallow `new` operators with the `Symbol` object

name: no-new-wrappers
description: Disallow `new` operators with the `String`, `Number`, and `Boolean` objects

name: no-nonoctal-decimal-escape
description: Disallow `\8` and `\9` escape sequences in string literals

name: no-obj-calls
description: Disallow calling global object properties as functions

name: no-object-constructor
description: Disallow calls to the `Object` constructor without an argument

name: no-octal
description: Disallow octal literals

name: no-octal-escape
description: Disallow octal escape sequences in string literals

name: no-param-reassign
description: Disallow reassigning function parameters

name: no-path-concat
description: Disallow string concatenation with `__dirname` and `__filename`

name: no-plusplus
description: Disallow the unary operators `++` and `--`

name: no-process-env
description: Disallow the use of `process.env`

name: no-process-exit
description: Disallow the use of `process.exit()`

name: no-promise-executor-return
description: Disallow returning values from Promise executor functions

name: no-proto
description: Disallow the use of the `__proto__` property

name: no-prototype-builtins
description: Disallow calling some `Object.prototype` methods directly on objects

name: no-redeclare
description: Disallow variable redeclaration

name: no-regex-spaces
description: Disallow multiple spaces in regular expressions

name: no-restricted-exports
description: Disallow specified names in exports

name: no-restricted-globals
description: Disallow specified global variables

name: no-restricted-imports
description: Disallow specified modules when loaded by `import`

allowTypeImports.description: Whether to allow type-only imports for a path.
Whether to allow type-only imports for a path.
Whether to allow type-only imports for a pattern.

name: no-restricted-modules
description: Disallow specified modules when loaded by `require`

name: no-restricted-properties
description: Disallow certain properties on certain objects

name: no-restricted-syntax
description: Disallow specified syntax

name: no-return-assign
description: Disallow assignment operators in `return` statements

name: no-return-await
description: Disallow unnecessary `return await`

name: no-script-url
description: Disallow `javascript:` URLs

name: no-self-assign
description: Disallow assignments where both sides are exactly the same

name: no-self-compare
description: Disallow comparisons where both sides are exactly the same

name: no-sequences
description: Disallow comma operators

name: no-setter-return
description: Disallow returning values from setters

name: no-shadow
description: Disallow variable declarations from shadowing variables declared in the outer scope

name: no-shadow-restricted-names
description: Disallow identifiers from shadowing restricted names

name: no-spaced-func
description: Disallow spacing between function identifiers and their applications (deprecated)

name: no-sparse-arrays
description: Disallow sparse arrays

name: no-sync
description: Disallow synchronous methods

name: no-tabs
description: Disallow all tabs

name: no-template-curly-in-string
description: Disallow template literal placeholder syntax in regular strings

name: no-ternary
description: Disallow ternary operators

name: no-this-before-super
description: Disallow `this`/`super` before calling `super()` in constructors

name: no-throw-literal
description: Disallow throwing literals as exceptions

name: no-trailing-spaces
description: Disallow trailing whitespace at the end of lines

name: no-unassigned-vars
description: Disallow `let` or `var` variables that are read but never assigned

name: no-undef
description: Disallow the use of undeclared variables unless mentioned in `/*global */` comments

name: no-undef-init
description: Disallow initializing variables to `undefined`

name: no-undefined
description: Disallow the use of `undefined` as an identifier

name: no-underscore-dangle
description: Disallow dangling underscores in identifiers

name: no-unexpected-multiline
description: Disallow confusing multiline expressions

name: no-unmodified-loop-condition
description: Disallow unmodified loop conditions

name: no-unneeded-ternary
description: Disallow ternary operators when simpler alternatives exist

name: no-unreachable
description: Disallow unreachable code after `return`, `throw`, `continue`, and `break` statements

name: no-unreachable-loop
description: Disallow loops with a body that allows only one iteration

name: no-unsafe-finally
description: Disallow control flow statements in `finally` blocks

name: no-unsafe-negation
description: Disallow negating the left operand of relational operators

name: no-unsafe-optional-chaining
description: Disallow use of optional chaining in contexts where the `undefined` value is not allowed

name: no-unused-expressions
description: Disallow unused expressions

name: no-unused-labels
description: Disallow unused labels

name: no-unused-private-class-members
description: Disallow unused private class members

name: no-unused-vars
description: Disallow unused variables

name: no-use-before-define
description: Disallow the use of variables before they are defined

name: no-useless-assignment
description: Disallow variable assignments when the value is not used

name: no-useless-backreference
description: Disallow useless backreferences in regular expressions

name: no-useless-call
description: Disallow unnecessary calls to `.call()` and `.apply()`

name: no-useless-catch
description: Disallow unnecessary `catch` clauses

name: no-useless-computed-key
description: Disallow unnecessary computed property keys in objects and classes

name: no-useless-concat
description: Disallow unnecessary concatenation of literals or template literals

name: no-useless-constructor
description: Disallow unnecessary constructors

name: no-useless-escape
description: Disallow unnecessary escape characters

name: no-useless-rename
description: Disallow renaming import, export, and destructured assignments to the same name

name: no-useless-return
description: Disallow redundant return statements

name: no-var
description: Require `let` or `const` instead of `var`

name: no-void
description: Disallow `void` operators

name: no-warning-comments
description: Disallow specified warning terms in comments

name: no-whitespace-before-property
description: Disallow whitespace before properties

name: no-with
description: Disallow `with` statements

name: nonblock-statement-body-position
description: Enforce the location of single-line statements

name: object-curly-newline
description: Enforce consistent line breaks after opening and before closing braces

name: object-curly-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing inside braces

name: object-property-newline
description: Enforce placing object properties on separate lines

name: object-shorthand
description: Require or disallow method and property shorthand syntax for object literals

name: one-var
description: Enforce variables to be declared either together or separately in functions

name: one-var-declaration-per-line
description: Require or disallow newlines around variable declarations

name: operator-assignment
description: Require or disallow assignment operator shorthand where possible

name: operator-linebreak
description: Enforce consistent linebreak style for operators

name: padded-blocks
description: Require or disallow padding within blocks

name: padding-line-between-statements
description: Require or disallow padding lines between statements

name: prefer-arrow-callback
description: Require using arrow functions for callbacks

name: prefer-const
description: Require `const` declarations for variables that are never reassigned after declared

name: prefer-destructuring
description: Require destructuring from arrays and/or objects

name: prefer-exponentiation-operator
description: Disallow the use of `Math.pow` in favor of the `**` operator

name: prefer-named-capture-group
description: Enforce using named capture group in regular expression

name: prefer-numeric-literals
description: Disallow `parseInt()` and `Number.parseInt()` in favor of binary, octal, and hexadecimal literals

name: prefer-object-has-own
description: Disallow use of `Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call()` and prefer use of `Object.hasOwn()`

name: prefer-object-spread
description: Disallow using `Object.assign` with an object literal as the first argument and prefer the use of object spread instead

name: prefer-promise-reject-errors
description: Require using Error objects as Promise rejection reasons

name: prefer-reflect
description: Require `Reflect` methods where applicable

name: prefer-regex-literals
description: Disallow use of the `RegExp` constructor in favor of regular expression literals

name: prefer-rest-params
description: Require rest parameters instead of `arguments`

name: prefer-spread
description: Require spread operators instead of `.apply()`

name: prefer-template
description: Require template literals instead of string concatenation

name: preserve-caught-error
description: Disallow losing originally caught error when re-throwing custom errors

requireCatchParameter.description: Requires the catch blocks to always have the caught error parameter so it is not discarded.

name: quote-props
description: Require quotes around object literal property names

name: quotes
description: Enforce the consistent use of either backticks, double, or single quotes

name: radix
description: Enforce the consistent use of the radix argument when using `parseInt()`

name: require-atomic-updates
description: Disallow assignments that can lead to race conditions due to usage of `await` or `yield`

name: require-await
description: Disallow async functions which have no `await` expression

name: require-unicode-regexp
description: Enforce the use of `u` or `v` flag on regular expressions

name: require-yield
description: Require generator functions to contain `yield`

name: rest-spread-spacing
description: Enforce spacing between rest and spread operators and their expressions

name: semi
description: Require or disallow semicolons instead of ASI

name: semi-spacing
description: Enforce consistent spacing before and after semicolons

name: semi-style
description: Enforce location of semicolons

name: sort-imports
description: Enforce sorted `import` declarations within modules

name: sort-keys
description: Require object keys to be sorted

name: sort-vars
description: Require variables within the same declaration block to be sorted

name: space-before-blocks
description: Enforce consistent spacing before blocks

name: space-before-function-paren
description: Enforce consistent spacing before `function` definition opening parenthesis

name: space-in-parens
description: Enforce consistent spacing inside parentheses

name: space-infix-ops
description: Require spacing around infix operators

name: space-unary-ops
description: Enforce consistent spacing before or after unary operators

name: spaced-comment
description: Enforce consistent spacing after the `//` or `/*` in a comment

name: strict
description: Require or disallow strict mode directives

name: switch-colon-spacing
description: Enforce spacing around colons of switch statements

name: symbol-description
description: Require symbol descriptions

name: template-curly-spacing
description: Require or disallow spacing around embedded expressions of template strings

name: template-tag-spacing
description: Require or disallow spacing between template tags and their literals

name: unicode-bom
description: Require or disallow Unicode byte order mark (BOM)

name: use-isnan
description: Require calls to `isNaN()` when checking for `NaN`

name: valid-typeof
description: Enforce comparing `typeof` expressions against valid strings

name: vars-on-top
description: Require `var` declarations be placed at the top of their containing scope

name: wrap-iife
description: Require parentheses around immediate `function` invocations

name: wrap-regex
description: Require parenthesis around regex literals

name: yield-star-spacing
description: Require or disallow spacing around the `*` in `yield*` expressions

name: yoda
description: Require or disallow "Yoda" conditions
